name: @sextant/pi-bus
description: A pi extension that makes a pi coding-agent session a first-class sextant bus client (TASK-177): its own scoped identity, addressable, wakeable on inbound frames, with bus tools, a /set-goal command over @sextant/conv-goals, a bundled sextant skill, and a pi.activity bridge so the dash renders a headless worker like any crew member.

scripts.build:deps: npm --prefix ../sdk install && npm --prefix ../sdk run build && npm --prefix ../conventions/goals install && npm --prefix ../conventions/goals run build
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/test/backpressure.test.js dist/test/gate.test.js dist/test/activity.test.js dist/test/goal_command.test.js dist/test/handoff.test.js
scripts.driven: npm run build:deps && npm run build && node dist/test/driven.js
scripts.driven:handoff: npm run build:deps && npm run build && node dist/test/driven_handoff.js
scripts.live-demo: npm run build:deps && npm run build && node dist/test/livedemo.js
